d1e3.d: Learn about the main tools and sections of the CapCut editing workspace. Understanding how the workspace is organized can help beginner users edit videos more confidently and efficiently.

d1e10.t: Basic Video Editing Concepts for Beginners
d1e10.d: Learn the basic editing concepts used in Capcut before creating a video. Understanding these terms and ideas will help make the editing process easier and less overwhelming.

d1e17.t: What Is CapCut and Why Use It for Social Media Editing?
d1e17.d: Learn what CapCut is and why it is commonly used for editing social media videos. Understanding the purpose and benefits of CapCut can help beginner users feel more confident before starting their first project.

d1e24.t: How to Export a Video for TikTok or Instagram
d1e24.d: Learn how to export your completed video using settings that work well for TikTok and Instagram. Exporting your video correctly helps maintain video quality and ensures it displays properly on social media platforms.

d1e31.t: How to Import, Arrange, and Trim Video Clips
d1e31.d: Learn how to import video clips into CapCut, organize them in the timeline, and trim unwanted footage. Completing this task will help you create a smoother and more organized video.

d1e39.t: How to Download CapCut and Start a New Project
d1e39.d: Learn how to download CapCut and create your first editing project. Completing this task will prepare you to begin editing videos for social media.

d1e46.t: How to Add Text, Music, and Audio to a Video
d1e46.d: Learn how to add text, music, and audio to improve the appearance and engagement of your video. Completing this task will help make your content clearer and more visually appealing for social media.

d1e53.t: CapCut Terms, Icons, and Recommended Export Settings
d1e53.d: Use this quick reference guide to understand common CapCut terms, editing icons, and recommended export settings for social media videos. This topic is intended to help beginner users quickly find information while editing.

d1e60.t: How to Add Transitions and Effects
d1e60.d: Learn how to add transitions and effects in CapCut to create smoother scene changes and improve the visual appearance of your video.
